network_summary: Dr. Mustapha Hotait DDS is the NPPES authorized official on two GP locations in Chicagoland (Dolton ZIP 60419 and Chicago ZIP 60629), both operating under United Dental Partners (UDP), a documented DSO headquartered in Chicago with PE backing from Calera Capital. The Dolton location (registered as MUSTAPHA HOTAIT DDS PC) operates as 'All Family Dental & Braces' under UDP. The Chicago/Pulaski location (registered as CHICAGO DENTAL COSMETICS, now rebranded to Advanced Family Dental) is also confirmed under UDP. Dr. Hotait's AO status reflects UDP's doctor-led model (dentists listed as AO on their own NPI records within the platform), not independent multi-office ownership. In 2018, Advanced Family Dental (14 offices) affiliated with Great Lakes Dental Partners (Shore Capital PE). The current operator is United Dental Partners with Calera Capital backing.
owner_operator_identity: Dr. Mustapha Hotait DDS (clinical lead / authorized official within United Dental Partners network; UDP co-founded by dentists as a doctor-led DSO platform; Calera Capital is PE backer)
legal_entities: MUSTAPHA HOTAIT DDS PC (NPPES entity, Dolton NPI 1689976540)
United Dental Partners (DSO/MSO platform, Chicago IL)
Advanced Family Dental and Orthodontics PC (affiliated 2018 with Great Lakes Dental Partners)

Dolton NPI 1689976540 entity name: MUSTAPHA HOTAIT DDS PC — consumer brand: All Family Dental & Braces; UDP Facebook page confirms Dolton location (facebook.com/DoltonDentalandbraces/)

Advanced Family Dental (14 offices) affiliated with Great Lakes Dental Partners (Shore Capital PE) in June 2018 per greatlakesdentalpartners.com press release
United Dental Partners PE backer: Calera Capital (confirmed via search result citing mergr.com and PitchBook profile)

mso_platform_pe_evidence: United Dental Partners (UDP) is the DSO/MSO operator of both locations. UDP is headquartered in Chicago, IL, provides centralized non-clinical services (marketing, HR, billing, credentialing, IT) to affiliated practices, and is backed by Calera Capital (PE). Source: uniteddentalpartners.com/about-us/our-story/ and uniteddentalpartners.com/locations/. Additional prior PE history: Advanced Family Dental's 14-office group affiliated with Great Lakes Dental Partners (Shore Capital Partners) in June 2018 per greatlakesdentalpartners.com/news/2018/06/11/chicagoland-smile-group-doubles-in-size-with-advanced-family-dental-partnership/.
stale_closed_false_positive_notes: Chicago Dental Cosmetics (60629) was marked CLOSED on Yelp as of June 2025, but the address 6338 S Pulaski Rd continues to operate as Advanced Family Dental under UDP (Yelp listing for Advanced Family Dental at same address updated May 2026). The NPPES entity name 'CHICAGO DENTAL COSMETICS' is a legacy registration; the operating brand has been Advanced Family Dental / UDP for years. The Dolton NPI registered as 'MUSTAPHA HOTAIT DDS PC' is the federal legal entity but operates consumer-facing as 'All Family Dental & Braces' under UDP. AO-cluster false-positive risk is LOW: Dr. Hotait is not a billing clerk but a dentist within the UDP platform whose name appears on both NPPES records as the affiliated clinical official.
evidence_chain: AO signal: MUSTAPHA HOTAIT appears as the NPPES authorized official on NPI 1689976540 (Dolton 60419, 'MUSTAPHA HOTAIT DDS PC') and NPI 1235680109 (Chicago 60629, 'CHICAGO DENTAL COSMETICS'). Web research corroboration: (1) Search results show Dr. Hotait practices at 'All Family Dental & Braces, 1350 E Sibley Blvd Ste 302, Dolton, IL 60419' — the exact address of NPI 1689976540. (2) Multiple UDP Facebook pages confirm both addresses as United Dental Partners locations (DoltonDentalandbraces, AdvancedFamilyDentalAsso, advancedfamilydental). (3) opencare.com and zocdoc.com list Dr. Hotait at 6338 S Pulaski Rd, Chicago under 'Advanced Family Dental.' (4) NexHealth booking for Advanced Family Dental routes through uniteddentalpartners slug. (5) Great Lakes Dental Partners press release (2018) confirms Advanced Family Dental's 14-office network joined GLDP (Shore Capital PE). (6) UDP confirmed PE-backed by Calera Capital via PitchBook/mergr. Documentary tier: branded_dso, pe_backed=true.
future_app_notes: Both locations are already in the corporate classification pipeline: location c6078e6641ef7f48 is already dso_regional with affiliated_dso 'All Family Dental & Braces (United Dental Partners)'. The Dolton location (5abb561bfd384285) is currently classified small_group — it should be reviewed for promotion to dso_national or dso_regional given the documented UDP affiliation. The AO signal here is not a new discovery of an independent multi-location dentist but rather confirmation that UDP's doctor-led structure shows member dentists as AO on their own NPI records. Downstream gate should verify: (a) whether the Dolton NPI's entity_classification can be promoted to dso_regional/dso_national given UDP evidence; (b) whether the Chicago location's 'CLOSED' Yelp signal means the NPI is stale (check phone activity — same phone (773) 767-1554 appears live on Advanced Family Dental Yelp as of May 2026). UDP brand in DB as 'All Family Dental & Braces (United Dental Partners)' — confirm affiliated_dso label is applied to Dolton location.
